subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! Both you and I are servants of this Threshold, attendants and guardians. Come, let us embrace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یار مهربانا من و تو هر دو بنده این آستانیم و خادم و پاسبان بیا دست در آغوش
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @unity; oneness of humanity
